description: High-performance image optimizer and converter (Pro edition). Requires a valid license.
notes: Pro requires a license key (https://getpixify.com/pricing). libvips on PATH: (1) Official script — irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mahammed-Gaber/pixify/main/install-vips.ps1 | iex (default under %USERPROFILE%\.pixify\vips). (2) Or Scoop extras/vips — different path than (1), PATH via Scoop shims. Docs: https://github.com/Mahammed-Gaber/pixify/blob/main/docs/install-libvips.md
